introLines.text: Yeah so I totally saw a UFO last night, it was crazy.
Dude, Vern, you're not gonna believe this...
Uh, hi, first time caller... I saw some lights?

detailLines.text: It was like... really bright. And flying around.
It did a bunch of loops and stuff. Very alien-like.
I didn't get a video but trust me it was wild.

defenseLines.text: I mean, I know what I saw, man.
Why would I lie about this?
My buddy saw it too, he's just not here right now.

acceptanceLines.text: Uh, yeah, exactly what I was thinking.
